findings.title: No negative test exercises the validator's audit_hint sub-object integrity checks
findings.details: The nested result.audit_hint integrity loop was correct but lacked negative tests for tampered audit hint fields.
findings.action: Added negative result-drift cases for nested audit_hint.audit_ledger_append_permitted, audit_hint.audit_event_write_permitted, and audit_hint.policy_ref.
findings.verification: node --test packages/control-plane/test/service.test.js passes with 145 tests; npm test passes with 229 tests.

findings.title: Reachable missing_permission_precheck_result guard has no negative test
findings.details: The first-argument S05 permission result object guard was correct but untested.
findings.action: Added negative tests for null, undefined, and array permissionResult inputs expecting the S06-local object guard.
findings.verification: node --test packages/control-plane/test/service.test.js passes with 145 tests; npm test passes with 229 tests.

findings.title: permission_precheck_denied guard is positioned after full S05 validation, making it redundant/unreachable and untested
findings.details: Denied permission and unsatisfied permission_decision_ref checks were previously masked by the full S05 result validator.
findings.action: Moved the S06-local allow_metadata_only and permission_decision_ref_satisfied guards before assertControlPlaneHermesValidationPermissionPrecheckResult, then added denied permission, failed permission precheck, and unsatisfied permission_decision_ref negative tests.
findings.verification: node --test packages/control-plane/test/service.test.js passes with 145 tests; npm test passes with 229 tests.

required_followups: Create the S06 closeout evidence under docs/goal-closeout/rp00-p02-m03-s06 after fixing/adjudicating the reported P2/P3 findings.
Rerun local validation gates after fixes; do not rerun Claude because this subphase uses exactly one Claude review.
review_limitations: Review was limited to the supplied diff and reported validation status; local validation was executed separately in this closeout process.
The wrapper JSON result field was malformed/truncated, but the Claude CLI run completed successfully and the intact findings were recovered from the session transcript without rerunning Claude.
parsed_review.summary: RP00.P02.M03.S06 implements a metadata-only Hermes Validation Audit hint precheck that consumes the S05 Permission precheck result, requires non-empty audit_event_ref and satisfied permission_decision_ref, carries S02, S03, S04, S05, M00 refs, TEN-001 through TEN-008 traces, validation contexts, and acceptance gates, and emits a frozen audit hint with all audit-write/runtime/Hermes/evidence/AuthZ/permission-engine/product-write flags false. It rejects forbidden and unknown truthy audit claims fail-closed and hands off to RP00.P02.M03.S07. No P0/P1 were reported; the P2 and P3 findings were accepted and fixed before production_ready promotion.

raw_claude_cli_result_summary.summary: Claude returned PASS_WITH_FINDINGS with one P2 and two P3 findings; all findings were fixed before production_ready evidence promotion.
